summary: Phase A & B testing complete: service-fee 3% applied at checkout & public booking, /api/bookings/availability returns slots & marks booked dates, public /api/public/* (catalog, availability, bookings) all working without auth, UI /book full 2-step flow PASS (catalog → form → submit → success page), mobile viewport 390x844 has no overflow. Found 1 critical backend bug (TZ compare in /bookings/availability) — FIXED. Found 1 frontend bug (Dashboard date filter omits booking_pending/booking_paid) — REPORTED.

integration_issues.flow: Dashboard date filter should show booking_pending/booking_paid as 'Booked' (brown)
integration_issues.issue: Dashboard.jsx line 49 fetches `api.get('/bookings', { params: { status: 'aktif' } })`. Public bookings (status='booking_pending') and paid bookings (status='booking_paid') are excluded from `bookings` state → `bookingsOnDate` filter never sees them → room cards remain green on date with pending/paid bookings. Verified: created public booking on room 1 for 2026-07-08, set Dashboard date filter to 2026-07-08, room 1 stayed green (only the pre-existing 'aktif' booking on room 7 showed brown).
integration_issues.fix_hint: Remove status filter or use status in ['aktif','booking_pending','booking_paid']. Example: api.get('/bookings').then(r => setBookings(r.data.filter(b => ['aktif','booking_pending','booking_paid'].includes(b.status))))

test_results.test_checkin_checkout_includes_service_f: PASS — subtotal=120000, service_fee=3600, total=123600, persisted via GET
test_results.test_checkout_insufficient_payment_400: PASS — paying only 120000 returns 400 (needs 123600 incl. fee)
test_results.test_availability_marks_booked_date: PASS (after fix) — booked date has available=false and reason contains booking kode
test_results.test_public_booking_standard_calc: PASS — subtotal=120000, fee=3600, total=123600, dp_min=61800, status='booking_pending', source='online', overlap rejected with 400
test_results.UI_public_book_page_no_auth_loads: PASS — header 'Pelangi Homestay', hero 'Booking Day Use', step indicator, date picker (pb-tanggal), 3 filter buttons (pb-tipe-all/std/cot), 2 catalog cards visible
test_results.UI_public_book_flow_step1_to_step2: PASS — clicking pb-room-1 navigates to step 2 form
test_results.UI_dashboard_date_filter_with_booking_pe: FAIL — public booking (booking_pending) does NOT trigger brown coloring on Dashboard date filter (see frontend_issues.integration_issues[0])

action_items: FRONTEND: Dashboard.jsx line ~49 — change `api.get('/bookings', { params: { status: 'aktif' } })` to fetch ALL booking statuses (or status in [aktif, booking_pending, booking_paid]) so public/online bookings also color room cards as 'Booked' on the filtered date as per spec.
OPTIONAL: PublicBook.jsx — image alt text could be more descriptive for SEO; consider adding loading skeleton while catalog loads.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py booking_availability (line ~1018, FIXED by testing agent): `datetime.fromisoformat('YYYY-MM-DD')` returns NAIVE datetime, but stored bookings use AWARE ISO strings. Comparison `bs < d_end` with `bs` aware and `d_end` naive raised TypeError → 500. Patched by adding `if base.tzinfo is None: base = base.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)`.
server.py public_create_booking (line ~287): hard-codes 6h block. For 'menginap' future support, expose tipe param. Minor.

server.py /bookings POST (line ~975) overlap query uses status='aktif' only; should also block against booking_pending/booking_paid to be consistent with availability endpoint. Currently a public pending booking could be overlapped by an internal day_use booking and vice-versa for the room_id+timespan in cross-flow. Note: public_create_booking already checks all 3 statuses, but internal create_booking still only checks 'aktif'.
Dashboard.jsx (line 49): filter status='aktif' silently breaks 'Booked' coloring for public/paid bookings. See action_items.

PublicBook.jsx: PUBLIC_API axios instance bypasses auth interceptors — good design, no token sent for /public/* endpoints. Console clean, no auth/CORS errors. Validation toast triggers on missing nama/no_hp/no_identitas before submit.
PublicBook.jsx SuccessView still mentions 'Pembayaran via Xendit akan dikirim ke WhatsApp' — copy is fine for Fase C placeholder but should be updated when Xendit lands.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase_ab.py (NEW: 11 regression tests for Phase A & B)

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (5/6 scenarios PASS — Dashboard date-filter integration with booking_pending fails)

test_credentials: owner / owner123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Public endpoints require no auth.
seed_data_creation: Created/cleaned: 2 internal checkins (TEST_ServiceFee, TEST_InsufFee), 4 bookings (TEST_Avail, TEST_Public_Std, TEST_Public_Cot, TEST_UI_Public, TEST_DASH_PEND). All deleted via DELETE /api/bookings/{id} or completed checkout. Verified no residual TEST_ rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A (service fee) + Phase B (alt-dates availability + public /book) are mostly done. ONE fixable frontend bug remains: Dashboard.jsx fetches bookings with status='aktif' only — must include booking_pending/booking_paid for the date-filter coloring spec. After fix, re-test: create public booking → set Dashboard date filter to booking date → verify room card turns brown + legend 'Booked (n)' increments. Phase C (Xendit) & D (WA/widgets) intentionally not tested. data-testids confirmed working: pb-tanggal, pb-tipe-all/std/cot, pb-catalog-Standard/Cottage, pb-room-{N}, pb-nama, pb-hp, pb-ktp, pb-jumlah, pb-kendaraan, pb-jam, pb-catatan, pb-service-fee, pb-total, pb-dp, pb-submit, pb-success-kode. Also co-service-fee in CheckOut (not UI-tested but persistence via API confirmed). booking-est-summary / alt-dates data-testids exist but UI test for alt-dates inside Bookings.jsx modal was not exercised (modal interaction skipped due to token budget).
rca_of_the_issue: Bug 1 (FIXED): server.py booking_availability did `datetime.fromisoformat(from_date)` where from_date='YYYY-MM-DD' yields naive dt; bookings stored with .isoformat() on UTC-aware dt include +00:00. The list iteration `if bs < d_end and be > d_start` mixed aware and naive datetimes → TypeError → 500 Internal Server Error. Fix: force UTC tzinfo on base. Mitigation: also consider switching all booking time storage to a canonical UTC ISO with explicit Z suffix to avoid future TZ ambiguity. Bug 2 (REPORTED): Dashboard.jsx only requests aktif bookings → bookingsOnDate excludes booking_pending/booking_paid → spec violation. Fix: drop status filter or include the 3 occupy-statuses.
